page_metadata.biotools__summary: Whisper is a tool for an accurate and high-performant mapping tool, based on the idea of sorting reads and then mapping them against suffix arrays for the reference genome and its reverse complement.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Whisper is a tool for an accurate and high-performant mapping tool, based on the idea of sorting reads and then mapping them against suffix arrays for the reference genome and its reverse complement.
